arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the IAM instance profile.

create_date.description: The date when the IAM instance profile was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the IAM instance profile.

path.description: The path under which the IAM instance profile is stored.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the role associated with the IAM instance profile.

role_id.description: The unique identifier for the role associated with the IAM instance profile.

role_name.description: The name of the role associated with the IAM instance profile.
